content.full_text:
FPPC LEGAL DEPT.

IN THE LAST CITY ELECTION ONLY 20% OF THE REGISTERED
VOTERS TURNED OUT AND VOTED. IN THE PRIOR ELECTION ONLY 21%
OF THE REGISTERED VOTERS VOTED. THESE NUMBERS ONLY PROVE
THAT THE PEOPLE HAVE GIVEN UP. I HAVE AN IDEA WHICH MIGHT
INCREASE THE NUMBERS CONSIDERABLY.

EACH PERSON IS GIVEN A VOTER STUB WHICH IS THE TOP OF
THE BALLOT THAT IS CAST. COULD A CANDIDATE ASK THAT THE
VOTER WRITE THEIR NAME AND ADDRESS ON THE BACK OF THE STUB
AND PLACE IT IN THE HAT FOR A LOTTERY. THIS LOTTERY WOULD
REWARD THOSE WHO VOTED DUE TO VOTER STUBS WOULD BE THE ONLY
WAY TO GET A CHANCE AT WINNING THE LOTTERY. THE ONLY WAY TO
GET A VOTER STUB IS TO GO VOTE AND CAST A BALLOT.

THIS IS JUST AN IDEA WHICH CAN BE EXPANDED ON BUT I FEEL
I NEED YOUR DECISION FIRST.

JOHN K BEACH,
[signature]
5152 FINEHILL AVE.

LA CRESCENTA, CA

91214


If there is text present in this document, it may be too faint or low contrast for me to read accurately. Could you please provide a clearer or higher contrast version of the image?
